certificate.description: PEM-encoded certificate data used for the SSL certificate; must be a valid X.509 certificate.

description.description: Defines the text description for the SSL certificate, providing context or purpose; optional and limited to 63 characters.

name.description: Specifies the name of the SSL certificate resource, which must be unique within the project and comply with GCP naming conventions.

name_prefix.description: Defines the prefix for the name of the SSL certificate. Must be unique within the project and region.

private_key.description: Private key in PEM format used for the SSL certificate; must correspond to the provided certificate.

timeouts.description: Specifies the timeout configuration for creating, updating, or deleting the SSL certificate.
